---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or functionality
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What do you want to add?
Describe the new feature in simple words.

## Where should it appear? (Location)
Say which part of the interface this feature belongs to (sidebar, pop-up, form, header, etc.).

- **Location**:  
- **Image if possible**: (link to a screenshot or a short description)  
- **How is it**: How the interface looks now in that area  
- **How it should be**: How you imagine it should look or work  

## Why is this useful?
Explain the benefit for users or for your work (for example: saves time, reduces mistakes, improves clarity).

## Alternatives you considered
Any other way you thought about solving this.

## Additional notes
Any extra information.
